function_app_id.desc: The encoded ID of the app

function_callback_id.desc: The callback ID defined in the function's definition file

function_id.desc: The encoded ID of the function

org_ids.desc: List of org IDs to allow for named\_entities permission

permission_type.desc: The type of permission that defines how the function can be distributed _Acceptable values:_ `everyone` `app_collaborators` `named_entities` `system`

team_ids.desc: List of team IDs to allow for named\_entities permission

desc: Set the access type of a custom slack function and define the users, team or org ids to be granted access if permission\_type is set to named\_entities

errors.invalid_named_entities: One or more of the named entities was not found
errors.invalid_permission_type: This function requires permission\_type to be set as named\_entities before adding users.
errors.user_not_found: One or more of the named entities was not found.
